name: ssh
description: Securely connect to a remote server over an encrypted SSH connection

options.label: Port
options.description: Port number to connect to on the remote host

options.label: Identity file
options.description: Path to the private key file for authentication

options.label: Verbose
options.description: Enable verbose mode for debugging connection issues

options.label: Forward agent
options.description: Enable forwarding of the SSH authentication agent connection

options.label: Local port forward
options.description: Forward a local port to a remote address (e.g., 8080:localhost:80)

options.label: Remote port forward
options.description: Forward a remote port to a local address (e.g., 9090:localhost:3000)

positionalArgs.label: Destination
positionalArgs.description: Remote host to connect to, optionally with user (e.g., user@hostname)

positionalArgs.label: Command
positionalArgs.description: Command to execute on the remote host instead of starting an interactive shell

examples.label: Connect to a remote server with a specific key
Set up a local port forward tunnel
Run a command on a remote server
SSH with key file and agent forwarding
SSH with local port forwarding for database access
